'''Golben''' was a [[Jillsarian/Legends|Jillsarian]] who worked as a technician onboard ''[[Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport/Legends|Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. His history was unknown, with some speculating that he got his start working in the [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] pits of [[Caprioril]] and others thinking he was a [[Technician/Legends|chief technician]] for [[Ne'Chak]]'s [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary group]]. Golben oversaw the work done in the repair bays, but would occasionally do jobs himself if the client was important enough.<ref name="PSG" />
